tsTroubleshooting.title: 25701 Wrong media width detected

abstract.p: When media is loaded, the operator fills in the media width of the media. When the media is used the first time after loading the M&C unit is measuring the media width. If the measured media width does not correspond with the entered media width, this error is reported and the media is unloaded.
Enter the correct media width during loading of the media.
